project.title: They Offered a Single Dad $3,800 for Dead Ponds — 2 Years Later, They Left With Nothing
project.description: Garrett Ballard, gà trống nuôi con 44 tuổi, thừa kế 6 mẫu đất với 4 hồ cá 'chết' từ người cha quá cố. Anh từ chối lời ép mua giá bèo của tập đoàn thủy sản Meridian, thả đàn cá loại thải, và sau 2 năm kiên nhẫn gây dựng đã buộc kẻ định giá mình phải ra về tay trắng.

style: photorealistic cinematic film still, 35mm film look, natural skin texture, soft depth of field
flashback_style: soft warm vignette, slightly faded colors, dreamy atmosphere

video_hook.video_style: photorealistic cinematic footage, 35mm film look, natural motion, smooth stabilized camera, clean frame free of watermarks, logos, or AI icons

characters.name: Garrett Ballard
characters.description: 44-year-old man, lean weathered build, short dark brown hair flecked with gray, tired deep-set eyes, three-day stubble, faded olive-green canvas work jacket over a gray flannel shirt, worn blue jeans, scuffed brown leather work boots

characters.name: Walt Ballard (cha, đã mất — hồi tưởng)
characters.description: 68-year-old man, weathered lean farmer build, deeply lined sun-creased face, short thinning white hair, calm patient eyes, faded tan canvas work coat over a brown plaid shirt, dark navy denim overalls, cracked brown leather work boots

characters.name: Preston Vance (người mua / phản diện Meridian)
characters.description: 52-year-old man, heavyset broad-shouldered build, full rounded clean-shaven face, thinning slicked-back gray hair, cool appraising eyes with a faint tight-lipped superior smile and chin lifted slightly, crisp charcoal-gray tailored business suit, pale blue dress shirt, polished black leather shoes

characters.name: Vernon Ordway (cán bộ khuyến nông)
characters.description: 60-year-old man, sturdy solid build, broad sun-weathered face, short gray hair under a faded olive-green cap, steady no-nonsense eyes, tan barn coat over a checked brown-and-cream shirt, dark work jeans, mud-caked brown boots

characters.name: Marlene Kirby (chủ trại giống)
characters.description: 55-year-old woman, practical stocky build, short curly graying auburn hair, alert direct eyes, weather-lined face, dark green rubber chest waders over a faded red flannel shirt, brown rubber boots

characters.name: Hollis Grant (chủ nhà hàng hải sản)
characters.description: 58-year-old man, trim upright build, close-cropped salt-and-pepper hair and short gray beard, sharp discerning eyes, white chef's jacket over a black apron, dark charcoal trousers, clean black shoes

characters.name: Reggie Alton (cựu nhân viên phân loại Meridian)
characters.description: 45-year-old man, wiry capable build, short black hair under a gray knit beanie, quiet watchful eyes, dark brown work fleece over a navy blue henley shirt, faded blue jeans, rubber-soled brown work boots

settings.name: Bốn hồ cá của Garrett (đất thừa kế)
settings.keywords: four earthen farm ponds, cracked slumping banks, rusted paddle-wheel aerator, murky still green water, weedy grass edges, scattered bare trees, low rural horizon

settings.name: Con đường sỏi dẫn vào trang trại
settings.keywords: gravel farm road, wire fence line, dry roadside grass, flat open farmland, distant treeline

settings.name: Co-op nông nghiệp (nơi Garrett làm bảo trì)
settings.keywords: rural farm supply co-op, stacked feed sacks, metal shelving, concrete floor, fluorescent overhead lighting, wide loading dock doors

settings.name: Trại giống cá của Marlene
settings.keywords: fish hatchery building, long concrete rearing tanks, aeration pipes, wet tiled floor, corrugated metal walls, hanging work lights

settings.name: Bếp nhà hàng hải sản của Hollis
settings.keywords: seafood restaurant kitchen, stainless steel prep counters, hanging pans, white tiled walls, industrial range, crates of ice

settings.name: Chợ nông sản cuối tuần
settings.keywords: outdoor farmers market, folding table with ice trays, canvas canopy, neighboring vendor stalls, small-town street

settings.name: Nhà kho đồ nghề của Walt (nơi chế biến cá)
settings.keywords: weathered wooden tool shed, hand tools hung on nail-studded plank walls, sturdy workbench, single hanging bulb light, dirt-and-concrete floor

settings.name: Quán ăn thị trấn (nơi tin đồn lan đi)
settings.keywords: small-town diner interior, long laminate counter with stools, coffee mugs, vinyl booths, window blinds, warm overhead lights

settings.name: Hồ chứa công nghiệp khổng lồ của Meridian
settings.keywords: vast industrial holding pond, wide graded earthen banks, sterile flat water surface, service road along the rim, bare graded earth, gray overcast sky
